{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2006}} {{Use dmy dates|date=October 2020}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 63rd Venice International Film Festival |image = 63rd Venice International Film Festival.jpg |image_alt = |image_size = 250px |caption = Festival poster |opening = ''[[The Black Dahlia (film)|The Black Dahlia]]'' |closing = ''[[The Island (2006 film)|The Island]]'' |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Still Life (2006 film)|Still Life]]'' |artistic_director= Marco Müller |host = [[Isabella Ferrari]] |number = |date = 30 August – 9 September 2006 |website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[62nd Venice International Film Festival|62nd]] | followed_by = [[64th Venice International Film Festival|64th]] }} The '''63rd annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''', was held from 30 August to 9 September 2006, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]]. French actress [[Catherine Deneuve]] was the jury president for the main competition. Italian actress [[Isabella Ferrari]] was the host of both ceremonies.{{cite web |title=63rd Venice Film Festival |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/news/cinema/en/63599.html |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20060929110825/http://www.labiennale.org/en/news/cinema/en/63599.html |archive-date=29 September 2006 |work=labiennale.org |df=dmy}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Still Life (2006 film)|Still Life]]'' by [[Jia Zhangke]]. The [[Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement]] was awarded to American filmmaker [[David Lynch]] who also presented ''[[Inland Empire (film)|Inland Empire]]'' out of competition, his last feature film.{{Cite web|url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/death-great-director-david-lynch|title=Biennale Cinema 2025 {{!}} The death of the great director David Lynch|lang=en|website=La Biennale di Venezia|date=2025-01-16|access-date=2026-01-25}} For the first time since the Second World War, all of the films entered into the main competition were shown as world premieres.{{cite web |title=VENICE 2006 – THE 63RD MOSTRA DEL CINEMA |url=http://www.americancinemapapers.com/files/VENICE_2006.htm |access-date=6 October 2013}}{{cite web |date=19 April 2010 |title=The 2000s |url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=503&lang=en |access-date=8 October 2013}} The festival opened with ''[[The Black Dahlia (film)|The Black Dahlia]]'' by [[Brian De Palma]], and closed with ''[[The Island (2006 film)|The Island]]'' by [[Pavel Lungin]]. ==Juries== === Main Competition (''Venezia 63'') === *[[Catherine Deneuve]], French actress - Jury President{{cite web|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/ |title=International Juries of the 63rd Venice Film Festival |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20060929104642/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/festival/juries/ |archive-date=29 September 2006 |df=dmy}}{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en|title=Juries for the 2000s|access-date=8 October 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170804133752/http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/?page_id=527&lang=en|archive-date=4 August 2017|url-status=dead}} *[[Paulo Branco]], Portuguese producer *[[Cameron Crowe]], American filmmaker and producer *[[Chulpan Khamatova]], Russian actress *[[Bigas Luna|Juan Josè Bigas Luna]], Spanish director and writer *[[Park Chan-wook]], South Korean filmmaker *[[Michele Placido]], Italian actor and director === ''[[Orizzonti]]'' === *[[Philip Gröning]], German fillmaker - Jury President *[[Carlo Carlei]], Italian director *[[:it:Giuseppe Genna|Giuseppe Genna]], Italian writer *Keiko Kusakabe, Japanese producer and distributor *[[Yousry Nasrallah]], Egyptian director === ''Opera Prima'' ("Luigi de Laurentiis" Award for a Debut Film) === *[[Paula Wagner]], American producer - Jury President *[[Guillermo del Toro]], Mexican filmmaker *[[Mohsen Makhmalbaf]], Iranian filmmaker and producer *[[Andrei Plakhov]], Russian critic *[[Stefania Rocca]], Italian actress === Short Film Competition (''Corto Cortissimo'') === *Teboho Mahlatsi, South African director and producer -
